c37d4ca18a28.title: Get your menu online — 77% of diners check before visiting
c37d4ca18a28.description: No online menu found. Most diners check the menu before committing. Without one, you lose the customer at the decision point.
c37d4ca18a28.management_implication: Every day without a menu is a percentage of potential customers lost.

d8109762c2b1.title: Close the hygiene gap — 4 to 5
d8109762c2b1.description: An FSA rating of 4 is visible on your Google listing and the FSA website. Customers see it before they see your menu. Address the inspector's specific findings.
d8109762c2b1.expected_upside: Remove the trust ceiling on your overall score

bd0afe2927fa.title: Establish basic web presence — you don't exist online beyond Google
bd0afe2927fa.description: No website, Facebook, or Instagram detected. Even a basic page improves discoverability and gives customers a reason to trust you before visiting.

30fb29ea9e3c.title: Fix the digital shopfront — you're losing walk-ins
30fb29ea9e3c.description: You deliver a strong experience but your online presence doesn't make it easy to act on. Can a new customer confirm your hours, see your menu, and book — all within 60 seconds on their phone? If not, that's your fix list.
30fb29ea9e3c.management_implication: Interest without conversion is vanity traffic.

fabc45d7b74f.title: Strong rating masks weak competitive position
fabc45d7b74f.description: Your 4.5/5 Google rating feels dominant but you sit below the local median (P0.0). Peer venues achieve similar or better ratings — in this market, 4.5 is table stakes, not a differentiator. Don't mistake the number for an advantage.
fabc45d7b74f.management_implication: The rating looks good in isolation but not in context.

9a52a899179c.title: Guest experience outpaces formal trust record
9a52a899179c.description: Guests enjoy the venue but the compliance record hasn't kept up. One poor inspection would make a private gap public. The fix is proactive compliance work, not more marketing.
9a52a899179c.expected_upside: Close the gap before it becomes visible

05e1c19aab14.title: Ranked #2 of 2 locally — peers are ahead
05e1c19aab14.description: At percentile 0.0, customers in this area have higher-rated alternatives. This isn't a crisis but it means you're competing on convenience rather than reputation.

17637d3d2c7f.title: Compliance record weakest in peer set — creates inspection exposure
17637d3d2c7f.description: You trail peers by 2.1 points on trust. This isn't a label problem — it means customers are getting a measurably better experience on this dimension from your competitors.

cac72226e93e.title: Protect the 4.5/5 rating — it took years to build
cac72226e93e.description: With 331 reviews at 4.5/5, your discovery advantage is substantial. Protect it by responding to every review within 48 hours and prompting satisfied tables for feedback.
